title: Bridge Essay: Neural network involvement for religious experiences in worship measured by EEG

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Liberation/Enlightenment** (Phase 15) with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Links Liberation/Enlightenment to mechanistic neuroscience.

**Neural network involvement for religious experiences in worship measured by EEG microstate analysis.** — Soc Neurosci. PMID: 35613474. DOI: 10.1080/17470919.2022.2083228. Not much is known about large-scale brain activation patterns in religious states of mind and previous studies have not set an emphasis on experience. The present study investigated the phenomenon of religious experiences through microstate analysis, and it was the first neurocognitive research to tackle the dimension of experience directly. Hence, atotal of 60 evangelical Christians participated in an experiment where they were asked to engage in worship and try to connect with God. With abar
